title: Vanilla+ Icons
description: An overhaul of the vanilla HUD textures.
body:
### This pack overhauls almost every HUD icon in the game. 

**Textures:**
- Hearts
- Hunger bar [​AppleSkin must be installed for the saturation overlay (golden carrots) to appear.]
- Armor Bar
- Hotbar
- Crosshair
- Air bar
- XP Bar
- Jumping Bar
- Server ping colors
- World/Server/Resource Pack navigation arrows

**Thank you for downloading!**
